title: RBI Consolidates Instructions on ₹2000 Note Withdrawal, Confirms Continued Legal Tender Status
description:
The RBI has consolidated all directions relating to the withdrawal of ₹2000 banknotes from circulation. The circular reiterates that these notes remain legal tender and can be exchanged or deposited at designated RBI offices.
The post RBI Consolidates Instructions on ₹2000 Note Withdrawal, Confirms Continued Legal Tender Status appeared first on TaxGuru.
